# Version Record Template

## 基本信息
- version_id:
- status:
- type: candidate / baseline / archived
- owner_role:

## 版本目标

- scope:
- non_goal:

- linked_projects:

## 进度与差距

- unresolved_items:
- blockers:

## 变更记录

- changed_why:
- decision_needed:
